_comment: Multi-start, multi-geology gradient inference (run_differentiable_inference_batch.py). Generates LHS-initialized starts (num_samples_N total), groups them in chunks of batch_size_M, and runs gradient descent on each. Outputs optimized well configs ready for Intersect submission via cli_surrogate_array_prepare.jl. Use this to recalibrate gradient-based MAPE against the patched-data retrained surrogate. Paths are relative to the surrogate repo root, not the inference dir, to match how the script is normally invoked.
